vulnerability.name: SHA-1 Usage
vulnerability.description: SHA-1 is deprecated and not FIPS 140-3 approved for new applications

statements.impact_statement: Redis source code patched to replace SHA-1 with FIPS-approved SHA-256 for all cryptographic operations (Lua script hashing, DEBUG DIGEST). See patches/redis-fips-sha256-redis7.2.4.patch for details.
